channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Elon Musk calls Navarro 'moron' after 'false' claims about Tesla
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk slammed President Trump's trade Peter Navarro on Tuesday, calling him "truly a moron.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: New audit, renewed criticism of Met Council's oversight of Southwest light rail project
item.description: The release of a new audit of the Southwest Corridor light rail project in the Twin Cities prompted sharp questions and bipartisan criticism from Minnesota lawmakers on Monday. Officials with the Metropolitan Council said the line is on track to begin service in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Mark Zdechlik, MPR News

item.title: Popular former Republican governor whom Trump urged to run for NH Senate makes 2026 decision
item.description: Former New Hampshire Republican Gov. Chris Sununu ruled out a 2026 Senate run for a seat the GOP is targeting to flip from blue to red.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China vows retaliation and a 'fight to the end' after Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: Trump said on Truth Social he would impose the new tariffs on China if Beijing did not retract a 34% retaliatory tariff on U.S. goods that it announced in response to Trump's initial salvo last Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch, MPR News

item.title: New Navy chief 'regrets' costly missile strikes against Houthis, pushes for cheaper Red Sea defense
item.description: Adm. James Kilby says expensive Red Sea missile defenses are not sustainable and calls on the military-industrial base to speed up cheaper munitions production.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supporters defend Trump’s pick to control America’s nuclear arsenal before Senate grilling
item.description: President Donald Trump's nominee for National Nuclear Security Administrator, Brandon Williams, is appearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spanberger raises $6.7 million in Virginia governor race
item.description: Former Rep. Abigail Spanberger’s (D-Va.) gubernatorial campaign said Monday it raised $6.7 million in the first quarter of the year. The haul included more than 50,000 donations of $100 or less in the first three months of the year, according to the Spanberger campaign.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Stephen A. Smith 'leaving all doors open' for presidential bid
item.description: Smith has a longstanding history of weighing in on politics, but has been particularly critical of the Democratic Party in the wake of President Trump’s success in the 2024 election, pushing for it to refocus on top issues for voters in last year’s election cycle including immigration and inflation.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Democrats targeting 35 Republicans in 2026
item.description: Last month, the National Republican Congressional Campaign Committee (NRCC) released its target list, which included 26 House Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boasberg contempt showdown looms after Supreme Court hands Trump immigration win
item.description: President Donald Trump praised the Supreme Court’s ruling, but a contempt hearing Tuesday could upend the win as Judge James Boasberg presses officials on secretive deportations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration plans to strip NYC of $188M for shelter program: Adams
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Trump administration is planning to strip New York City of $188 million, Mayor Eric Adams announced on Tuesday. The $188 million includes more than $80 million that the Federal Emergency Management Agency clawed back from the city in February.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Protecting the playing field: GOP urges governors to take action on women’s sports
item.description: Sens. Jim Risch and Tommy Tuberville are urging governors across the country to adhere to President Donald Trump’s executive order to keep men out of women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Conservative website‘s bid to access Sen. Mitchell body camera footage revived by appeals court
item.description: Alpha News sought to compel law enforcement to release certain video related to Sen. Nicole Mitchell’s arrest in April 2024. An appeals court ruling has reopened the possibility of body and dash camera footage being released ahead of her trial.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Dem governors revolt against Trump's 'Liberation Day' tariffs
item.description: Democratic governors have rejected President Donald Trump's tariffs and tried to thwart their impact on individual states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Growing opposition from House conservatives threatens to derail Trump's agenda
item.description: Growing opposition among hard-line House conservatives to the Senate’s framework for advancing President Trump’s ambitious legislative agenda is threatening to make this week’s vote one of the heaviest lifts yet for Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.).
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says high tariffs may have prevented the Great Depression. History says different
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In the early days of the Great Depression, Rep. Willis Hawley, a Republican from Oregon, and Utah Republican Sen. Reed Smoot thought they had landed on a way to protect American farmers and manufacturers from foreign competition: tariffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IRS and DHS reach historic deal to aid in pursuit of illegal immigrants subject to deportation
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security and Internal Revenue Service will collaborate to target criminal illegal immigrants subject to deportation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump tariffs about renegotiating trade deals, not jobs: Kasparian
item.description: Kasparian doesn't think Trump's tariffs are aimed at bringing factory jobs back despite what the president has said.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: Fired Justice Department pardon attorney accuses the agency of 'ongoing corruption,' abuse of power
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Justice Department's recently fired pardon attorney accused the leadership of the law enforcement agency of “ongoing corruption," testifying Monday at a congressional hearing meant to showcase concerns that the Trump administration is assaulting the rule of law, abusing its pow
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump-backed bills on activist judges, non-citizen voting heading for House-wide votes
item.description: House lawmakers are ready to vote on two key bills aligning with President Trump's agenda this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to deport Venezuelans under wartime law, but only after judges' review
item.description: In a bitterly divided 5-4 decision, the court said the administration must give Venezuelans who it claims are gang members “reasonable time” to go to court.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Memo: Trump under pressure on tariffs as Dow sinks again
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell yet again on Monday, keeping President Trump under pressure over the tariff policy that has roiled the world since it was announced last Wednesday. Trump appear adamant that tariffs are here to stay.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Capitol jargon cheat sheet as Minnesota lawmakers approach crucial session deadline
item.description: The 2025 Minnesota legislative session faces a cutoff point this week as lawmakers work toward their final day of May 19. Here are some terms that might help you navigate the Capitol push.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: TikTok creators go from sadness and fear to...'whatever!' over app's future
item.description: It's been an emotional rollercoaster for TikTok creators over the past few months, with the app's future uncertain. But there are ways to decompress.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman, MPR News

item.title: Trump closes loophole used by American shoppers to buy Chinese goods tariff-free
item.description: The so-called de minimis exemption allowed Chinese and Hong Kong retailers to ship millions of packages worth $800 or less directly to U.S. consumers. That loophole will close May 2.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann, MPR News
